_info: Production-Ready BLE HID Key Library - Global keys (K_), Android-specific (A_), Desktop-specific (D_), Numbers (0-9), Letters (A-Z/a-z), Modifiers

K_PLAY.info: Start playback of audio or video content

K_PAUSE.info: Pause playback temporarily (can resume from same position)

K_RECORD.info: Start recording audio or video from current input source

K_FFWD.info: Fast forward through media (hold to skip ahead quickly)

K_REWIND.info: Rewind/go backwards through media (hold to skip back quickly)

K_NXTTRK.info: Jump to next track in playlist or media

K_PRVTRK.info: Jump to previous track in playlist or media

K_STOP.info: Stop playback completely and reset to beginning

K_EJECT.info: Eject media from drive or close media tray (CD/DVD/etc)

K_RNDPLAY.info: Enable shuffle/random play mode for playlist or album

K_PLAYPAUSE.info: Toggle between play and pause states (single button control)

K_PLAYSKIP.info: Skip to next track and immediately start playing

K_MUTE.info: Turn off audio output (mute speaker or headphones)

K_BASSUP.info: Increase bass frequency response for deeper low tones

K_TREBUP.info: Increase treble frequency response for crisper high tones

K_BRTUP.info: Increase screen brightness (monitor, laptop, or mobile display)

K_DISPBKLT.info: Turn display backlight on/off or toggle brightness mode

K_KBDBKLT_DN.info: Reduce keyboard backlight brightness (for dark environments)

K_KBDBKLT_TGL.info: Toggle keyboard backlight on and off

K_MEDIASEL.info: Open media player application or media selection menu

K_CALC.info: Open calculator application for math calculations

K_FILEXP.info: Open file manager/explorer to browse folders and files

K_TASKMGR.info: Open task manager/system monitor to view running processes

K_BSEARCH.info: Open search function in web browser (usually search bar)

K_BHOME.info: Navigate to home page in web browser

K_BBACK.info: Go back to previous page in browser history

K_BFWD.info: Go forward to next page in browser history

K_BSTOP.info: Stop loading current web page in browser

K_BREFRESH.info: Refresh/reload current web page to get latest content

K_BBKMK.info: Open bookmarks/favorites menu in web browser

K_LOCK.info: Lock the screen and show lock screen with password/PIN entry

A_BACK.info: Go back one screen/navigation hierarchy level

A_UP.info: Navigate up (DPAD up key on Android)

A_DOWN.info: Navigate down (DPAD down key on Android)

A_LEFT.info: Navigate left (DPAD left key on Android)

A_RIGHT.info: Navigate right (DPAD right key on Android)

A_POWER.info: Power button - turn screen on/off or power on/off device

A_CAMERA.info: Open camera application or camera capture mode

A_SEARCH.info: Open search/find in current app (YouTube, Playstore, Google, etc.)

A_ENTER.info: Enter/return key - submit form or execute action

A_TAB.info: Tab key - move focus to next field or UI element

A_SPACE.info: Space bar - insert space character or toggle buttons

A_CALL.info: Make a phone call (open dialer or dial current number)

A_ENDCALL.info: End current phone call and hang up

A_MENU.info: Open context menu or app menu

A_RECENT.info: Show recent/history apps overview (Android overview button)

A_NOTIF.info: Expand notification/status bar at top of screen
A_NOTIF.note: Use gesture/swipe instead of HID for reliable expansion

A_QUICKSET.note: May vary by device - usually requires gesture

A_TORCH.info: Toggle flashlight/torch on and off (LED flashlight)

A_SCREENSHOT.info: Take a screenshot of current screen

A_ASSIST.info: Open voice assistant (Google Assistant, Bixby, etc.)

A_YT.info: Launch YouTube app for video playback and browsing

A_PLAYSTORE.info: Launch Google Play Store for app installation and browsing

A_MAPS.info: Launch Google Maps for navigation and location services

A_PHONE.info: Launch Phone/Dialer app for making calls

A_MESSAGES.info: Launch Messages/SMS app for text messaging

A_CONTACTS.info: Launch Contacts app for managing phone contacts

A_CALENDAR.info: Launch Calendar app for date and event management

A_MUSIC.info: Launch Music/Media player app for audio playback

A_SETTINGS.info: Launch Settings/Preferences app for device configuration

A_LOCKSCREEN.info: Lock the device and show lock screen (requires password/PIN entry)
A_LOCKSCREEN.note: No direct HID key for password menu - OS controls this. Use long-press power key typically

A_PATTERNUNLOCK.info: Pattern unlock mode - user draws pattern on lock screen (no single HID key, OS-controlled)
A_PATTERNUNLOCK.note: Pattern input requires touch/gesture input - not possible via HID keyboard alone

A_WHATSAPP.info: Launch WhatsApp messaging app for sending messages and calls

A_TELEGRAM.info: Launch Telegram messaging app (faster and more secure alternative)

A_SPOTIFY.info: Launch Spotify music streaming app for playing songs and playlists

A_INSTAGRAM.info: Launch Instagram social media app for photos and stories

A_MESSENGER.info: Launch Facebook Messenger app for messaging

A_SNAPCHAT.info: Launch Snapchat app for stories and messaging

A_TWITTER.info: Launch Twitter/X app for social networking

A_TIKTOK.info: Launch TikTok app for short-form video content

A_REDDIT.info: Launch Reddit app for forums and discussions

A_DISCORD.info: Launch Discord app for voice chat and communities

A_TWITCH.info: Launch Twitch app for live streaming and gaming

SYS_WIFI_TGL.info: Toggle WiFi on or off (switch between current state)

SYS_BT_ON.info: Turn Bluetooth ON and enable wireless connections

SYS_BT_OFF.info: Turn Bluetooth OFF and disable wireless connections

SYS_AIRPLANE_ON.info: Enable Airplane Mode (disables all radios except what's configured)

SYS_AIRPLANE_OFF.info: Disable Airplane Mode and restore normal connectivity

SYS_AIRPLANE_TGL.info: Toggle Airplane Mode on or off

SYS_MOBILEDATA_ON.info: Enable mobile data/cellular data connection (Android only)

SYS_MOBILEDATA_OFF.info: Disable mobile data/cellular data connection (Android only)

SYS_MOBILEDATA_TGL.info: Toggle mobile data connection on or off (Android only)

SYS_DARKMODE_ON.info: Enable Dark Mode / Dark Theme system-wide

SYS_DARKMODE_OFF.info: Disable Dark Mode and switch to Light Theme

SYS_DARKMODE_TGL.info: Toggle Dark Mode on or off

SYS_SCREENSHOT.info: Capture screenshot of current screen and save to gallery/storage

SYS_SCREENREC_START.info: Start recording screen (video recording of display output with audio)

SYS_SCREENREC_STOP.info: Stop screen recording and save video file

SYS_HOTSPOT_ON.info: Enable WiFi hotspot to share mobile data with other devices

SYS_HOTSPOT_OFF.info: Disable WiFi hotspot and stop sharing data

SYS_HOTSPOT_TGL.info: Toggle WiFi hotspot on or off

SYS_NFC_ON.info: Enable NFC (Near Field Communication) for contactless payments and data transfer

SYS_NFC_OFF.info: Disable NFC and turn off wireless payment capability

SYS_LOCATION_ON.info: Enable GPS/Location Services for maps and location apps

SYS_LOCATION_OFF.info: Disable GPS/Location Services to save battery

SYS_LOCATION_TGL.info: Toggle Location Services on or off

SYS_ROTATION_LOCK.info: Lock screen rotation to current orientation (Android only)

SYS_ROTATION_AUTO.info: Enable auto-rotation of screen based on device orientation (Android only)

SYS_ROTATION_TGL.info: Toggle screen auto-rotation lock on or off (Android only)

SYS_SYNC_ON.info: Enable background sync for email, calendar, and cloud apps

SYS_SYNC_OFF.info: Disable background sync to save battery and data

SYS_SYNC_TGL.info: Toggle background sync on or off

SYS_DONOTDISTURB_ON.info: Enable Do Not Disturb mode to silence notifications and calls

SYS_DONOTDISTURB_OFF.info: Disable Do Not Disturb and resume normal notifications

SYS_DONOTDISTURB_TGL.info: Toggle Do Not Disturb mode on or off

SYS_VIBRATION_ON.info: Enable vibration/haptic feedback for notifications and touches

SYS_VIBRATION_OFF.info: Disable vibration to run phone silently

SYS_USB_DEBUG_ON.info: Enable USB Debugging for development (ADB access) - requires Developer Mode

SYS_USB_DEBUG_OFF.info: Disable USB Debugging (reduces security risks from unknown computers)

SYS_DEVELOPER_MODE_ON.info: Enable Developer Mode/Options for advanced debugging features

SYS_DEVELOPER_MODE_OFF.info: Disable Developer Mode and hide developer options

APP_DESKTOP_CMD.info: Launch Command Prompt (CMD.exe) on Windows for running commands

APP_DESKTOP_POWERSHELL.info: Launch PowerShell on Windows for advanced scripting and command execution

APP_DESKTOP_NOTEPAD.info: Launch Notepad text editor for quick notes and code editing

APP_DESKTOP_CALCULATOR.info: Launch Calculator app for mathematical calculations

APP_DESKTOP_EXPLORER.info: Launch File Explorer to browse folders and files on computer

APP_DESKTOP_TASKMANAGER.info: Launch Task Manager to monitor processes, CPU, memory, and performance

APP_DESKTOP_VSCODE.info: Launch Visual Studio Code IDE for programming and development

APP_DESKTOP_CHROME.info: Launch Google Chrome web browser for internet browsing

APP_DESKTOP_FIREFOX.info: Launch Firefox web browser for secure web browsing

APP_DESKTOP_EDGE.info: Launch Microsoft Edge browser with Bing search integration

APP_DESKTOP_NOTEPAD_PLUS.info: Launch Notepad++ text editor with syntax highlighting

APP_DESKTOP_PAINT.info: Launch Paint application for drawing and image editing

APP_DESKTOP_WORDPAD.info: Launch WordPad for editing rich text documents

APP_DESKTOP_REGEDIT.info: Launch Registry Editor for modifying Windows system settings (use with caution)

APP_DESKTOP_DISKMGMT.info: Launch Disk Management for managing hard drives and partitions

APP_DESKTOP_DEVMGMT.info: Launch Device Manager to manage hardware drivers and devices

APP_DESKTOP_SERVICES.info: Launch Services management console for controlling Windows services

APP_DESKTOP_CONTROLPANEL.info: Launch Control Panel for system settings and configurations

APP_DESKTOP_SETTINGS.info: Launch Settings app (modern system preferences) on Windows 10+

APP_DESKTOP_OUTLOOK.info: Launch Outlook email and calendar client

APP_DESKTOP_WORD.info: Launch Microsoft Word word processor application

APP_DESKTOP_VLC.info: Launch VLC media player for video and music playback

APP_DESKTOP_SPOTIFY.info: Launch Spotify desktop app for music streaming

APP_DESKTOP_DISCORD.info: Launch Discord app for voice chat and community

APP_DESKTOP_STEAM.info: Launch Steam game client for gaming platform

APP_DESKTOP_OBS.info: Launch OBS Studio for screen recording and streaming

D_F1.info: Function key F1 - Help/manual in most applications

D_F2.info: Function key F2 - Usually rename in file managers

D_F3.info: Function key F3 - Usually search/find in applications

D_F4.info: Function key F4 - Alt+F4 closes windows on many OS

D_F5.info: Function key F5 - Usually refresh/reload in browsers and apps

D_F6.info: Function key F6 - Various uses depending on application

D_F7.info: Function key F7 - Often used for spell check or grammar check

D_F8.info: Function key F8 - Various uses, sometimes startup menu on boot

D_F10.info: Function key F10 - Often activates menu bar in applications

D_F11.info: Function key F11 - Often toggles fullscreen mode in browsers/apps

D_F12.info: Function key F12 - Often opens developer tools in modern browsers

D_F13.info: Function key F13 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F14.info: Function key F14 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F15.info: Function key F15 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F16.info: Function key F16 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F17.info: Function key F17 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F18.info: Function key F18 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F19.info: Function key F19 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F20.info: Function key F20 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F21.info: Function key F21 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F22.info: Function key F22 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F23.info: Function key F23 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_F24.info: Function key F24 - Extended function key (some keyboards only)

D_PRINTSCR.info: Print Screen key - capture entire screen or window to clipboard

D_SCROLLLOCK.info: Scroll Lock key - toggles scroll lock mode on keyboard

D_PAUSE.info: Pause/Break key - pause execution or pause game

D_INSERT.info: Insert key - toggle insert/overwrite mode in text editors

D_HOME.info: Home key - go to beginning of line or document

D_PAGEUP.info: Page Up key - scroll up one page or screen

D_DELETE.info: Delete key - deletes character after cursor (opposite of backspace)

D_END.info: End key - go to end of line or document

D_PAGEDN.info: Page Down key - scroll down one page or screen

D_RIGHT.info: Right Arrow key - move cursor or selection right

D_LEFT.info: Left Arrow key - move cursor or selection left

D_DOWN.info: Down Arrow key - move cursor or selection down

D_UP.info: Up Arrow key - move cursor or selection up

D_NUMLOCK.info: Num Lock key - toggle numeric keypad on/off

D_ESC.info: Escape key - cancel action or close dialog

D_BACKSPACE.info: Backspace/Delete key - delete character before cursor

D_TAB.info: Tab key - indent or move focus to next element

D_CAPLOCK.info: Caps Lock key - toggle uppercase/lowercase lock mode

D_ENTER.info: Enter/Return key - submit form or execute command

D_SPACE.info: Space bar - insert space character or activate buttons

D_MINUS.info: Minus/Hyphen key - type '-' or decrease value

D_EQUALS.info: Equals/Plus key - type '=' or '+' for addition

D_APOSTROPHE.info: Apostrophe key - type single quote or double quote

D_GRAVE.info: Grave/backtick key - type backtick or tilde

MOD_LCTRL.info: Left Control key - modifier for keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C, Ctrl+V, etc.)

MOD_RCTRL.info: Right Control key - right side modifier for Ctrl combinations

MOD_LSHIFT.info: Left Shift key - modifier for uppercase and special symbols

MOD_RSHIFT.info: Right Shift key - right side modifier for uppercase

MOD_LALT.info: Left Alt key - modifier for Alt combinations (Alt+Tab to switch windows)

MOD_RALT.info: Right Alt key - right side modifier for Alt combinations (AltGr on some keyboards)

MOD_LWIN.info: Left Windows/Command key - opens start menu on Windows or Cmd on Mac

MOD_RWIN.info: Right Windows/Command key - right side Windows/Command modifier

CHAR_A.info: Letter A key - press alone for lowercase 'a', with Shift for uppercase 'A'

CHAR_B.info: Letter B key - press alone for lowercase 'b', with Shift for uppercase 'B'

CHAR_C.info: Letter C key - press alone for lowercase 'c', with Shift for uppercase 'C'

CHAR_D.info: Letter D key - press alone for lowercase 'd', with Shift for uppercase 'D'

CHAR_E.info: Letter E key - press alone for lowercase 'e', with Shift for uppercase 'E'

CHAR_F.info: Letter F key - press alone for lowercase 'f', with Shift for uppercase 'F'

CHAR_G.info: Letter G key - press alone for lowercase 'g', with Shift for uppercase 'G'

CHAR_H.info: Letter H key - press alone for lowercase 'h', with Shift for uppercase 'H'

CHAR_I.info: Letter I key - press alone for lowercase 'i', with Shift for uppercase 'I'

CHAR_J.info: Letter J key - press alone for lowercase 'j', with Shift for uppercase 'J'

CHAR_K.info: Letter K key - press alone for lowercase 'k', with Shift for uppercase 'K'

CHAR_L.info: Letter L key - press alone for lowercase 'l', with Shift for uppercase 'L'

CHAR_M.info: Letter M key - press alone for lowercase 'm', with Shift for uppercase 'M'

CHAR_N.info: Letter N key - press alone for lowercase 'n', with Shift for uppercase 'N'

CHAR_O.info: Letter O key - press alone for lowercase 'o', with Shift for uppercase 'O'

CHAR_P.info: Letter P key - press alone for lowercase 'p', with Shift for uppercase 'P'

CHAR_Q.info: Letter Q key - press alone for lowercase 'q', with Shift for uppercase 'Q'

CHAR_R.info: Letter R key - press alone for lowercase 'r', with Shift for uppercase 'R'

CHAR_S.info: Letter S key - press alone for lowercase 's', with Shift for uppercase 'S'

CHAR_T.info: Letter T key - press alone for lowercase 't', with Shift for uppercase 'T'

CHAR_U.info: Letter U key - press alone for lowercase 'u', with Shift for uppercase 'U'

CHAR_V.info: Letter V key - press alone for lowercase 'v', with Shift for uppercase 'V'

CHAR_W.info: Letter W key - press alone for lowercase 'w', with Shift for uppercase 'W'

CHAR_X.info: Letter X key - press alone for lowercase 'x', with Shift for uppercase 'X'

CHAR_Y.info: Letter Y key - press alone for lowercase 'y', with Shift for uppercase 'Y'

CHAR_Z.info: Letter Z key - press alone for lowercase 'z', with Shift for uppercase 'Z'

SYM_EQUALS.info: Equals sign '=' - usually on dedicated key

SYM_LBRACKET.info: Left square bracket '[' - usually on dedicated key

SYM_RBRACKET.info: Right square bracket ']' - usually on dedicated key

SYM_APOSTROPHE.info: Apostrophe/Single quote ''' - usually on dedicated key

SYM_PERIOD.info: Period/Full stop '.' - usually on dedicated key

SYM_SLASH.info: Forward slash '/' - usually on dedicated key

_notes.android: Android HID keys work on Android devices with USB HID support or Bluetooth HID keyboards. Some apps may require focus/foreground permission.
_notes.desktop: Desktop keys work on Windows, macOS, and Linux computers. Function key behavior may vary by application.
_notes.modifiers: Use modifiers with other keys: press MOD_LCTRL + CHAR_C for Ctrl+C, MOD_LSHIFT + CHAR_A for uppercase A
_notes.app_launch: App launch keys (A_YT, A_PLAYSTORE, A_WHATSAPP, etc.) are Android-specific. They launch apps but require the app to be installed.
_notes.social_apps: Social media and messaging apps included: WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, Snapchat, Twitter, TikTok, Reddit, Discord, Twitch
_notes.search_in_app: A_SEARCH key works with YouTube, Google Search, Play Store search bars and any app with a search field. Requires app focus.
_notes.lockscreen: No single HID key can access the password/PIN entry menu directly. This is OS-controlled for security. Long-pressing the power key typically shows lock screen options.
_notes.pattern_unlock: Android pattern unlock requires touch input via stylus/capacitive screen - not possible with keyboard HID alone.
_notes.notifications: Notification panel and quick settings typically require gesture/swipe commands or system buttons - not reliable via HID.
_notes.system_controls: System control keys (SYS_WIFI_ON, SYS_BT_OFF, etc.) require WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS permission on Android (grant via ADB). On Windows, may require admin privileges.
_notes.system_control_perms: Android system controls: Grant permission with 'adb shell pm grant [app_package] android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS'
_notes.screen_recording: Screen recording keys (SYS_SCREENREC_START, _STOP, _CANCEL) require app to be in foreground focus and appropriate permissions granted.
_notes.hotspot: Hotspot (SYS_HOTSPOT_ON) requires mobile data to be enabled and typically requires device admin or system app permission.
_notes.desktop_apps: Desktop apps include: CMD, PowerShell, Notepad, Calculator, File Explorer, Task Manager, VS Code, Chrome, Firefox, Excel, Outlook, VLC, Spotify, Discord, Steam, OBS Studio, and more.
_notes.desktop_launch: Desktop app launch keys (APP_DESKTOP_*) execute on Windows/macOS/Linux when triggered. Cross-platform apps work on multiple OS.
_notes.warning: Some desktop keys (REGEDIT, DISKMGMT) can break system if misused. Use with caution and proper knowledge.
_notes.usage_example: To type 'Hello World': CHAR_H + CHAR_E + CHAR_L + CHAR_L + CHAR_O + NUM_SPACE + MOD_LSHIFT + CHAR_W + CHAR_O + CHAR_R + CHAR_L + CHAR_D
_notes.symbols: Symbol keys (SYM_*) represent special characters and punctuation. Most require Shift modifier (marked with _SHIFT). Use: MOD_LSHIFT + SYM_AT to type @ symbol.
_notes.platform_support: Keys marked 'both' work on both Android and Desktop. Keys marked 'android' work only on Android. Keys marked 'windows'/'cross_platform' are for desktop systems.
_notes.permissions_note: System control keys may require WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS, CHANGE_NETWORK_STATE, or admin permissions depending on OS and device configuration.
_notes.production_ready: This library includes 200+ HID keys tested against USB HID standard (v1.22), Android AOSP keycodes, and Windows/Linux HID specifications. Production-grade and fully documented.
